title: OpenRouter model dropdown not populated
symptom: When using the OpenRouter node, the model dropdown is empty, preventing selection of a model. Users see 'no models show up' in the dropdown.
applies_when: Expecting to select a model from the dropdown
not_this_if: Models are visible in the dropdown in other setups
root_cause: The OpenRouter node is designed to work with OpenAI models, and the dropdown is populated based on the connection to OpenAI. If the connection is misconfigured or if the node is not set up correctly, the dropdown may not display any models.
fix_steps: Obtain the model ID from OpenRouter documentation or interface
Manually enter the model ID in the appropriate field instead of using the dropdown
Save the workflow and test again
agent_instruction: Manually enter the model ID from OpenRouter instead of using the empty dropdown.
